title: How We'd Assess a SaaS Startup: A Hypothetical Walkthrough
summary: Walk through our complete security assessment process step-by-step for a hypothetical SaaS startup. Learn exactly what we look for and why.

title: How to Make Your Security Assessment Actionable (Instead of Shelf-Worthy)
summary: Most security audit reports gather dust. Here's a practical guide on how to turn high-level audit findings into actionable engineering tickets.

title: The Blueprint Model: Why We Deliver Architecture, Not Just Recommendations
summary: Why traditional consultancy models fail and why we provide production-ready IaC baselines and architecture blueprints instead of just a PDF.

title: Why We Don't Guarantee Security (And Why That's Honest, Not Lazy)
summary: Absolute security is a myth. We explain why transparency around residual risks is the only honest way to build a real security posture.

title: 5 Things Every Startup Should Do This Week for Security (That Cost Nothing)
summary: No budget? No dedicated security hire? These 5 essential security hygiene tasks will protect your critical data and cost you nothing but time.
